scripts.parity: bun scripts/parity-check.ts parity-traces/handshake-empty.jsonl && bun scripts/parity-check.ts parity-traces/handshake-character.jsonl --fixture parity-traces/fixtures/handshake-character && bun scripts/parity-check-message-append.ts
scripts.parity:compiled: bun scripts/parity-check.ts parity-traces/handshake-empty.jsonl ./dist/shore-daemon && bun scripts/parity-check.ts parity-traces/handshake-character.jsonl ./dist/shore-daemon --fixture parity-traces/fixtures/handshake-character && bun scripts/parity-check-message-append.ts ./dist/shore-daemon
